name: Visily
description: AI-powered wireframing and UI design tool for non-designers. Converts screenshots to editable designs, generates wireframes from text prompts, and provides a rich template library.

seo.title: Visily — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Visily: AI-powered wireframing and UI design tool for non-designers. Converts screenshots to editable designs, generates wireframes from text prompts, and provi

when_to_use: Wireframe generated from screenshot of competitor product
Text prompt converted to editable wireframe in 30 seconds
Non-designer PM creates prototype for stakeholder review
Template-based mobile app wireframe completed without design skills
AI layout suggestion used as starting point for UX iteration

pros: Screenshot-to-editable-design conversion is a real time saver
Rich template library covers common app patterns
cons: Outputs are wireframes, not production-ready designs
Less powerful than Figma for detailed design work
Collaboration features trail mature design tools
review.verdict: Strong wireframing tool for PMs and startup teams early in a project; hand off to real design tools for polish.
review.best_for: PMs, founders, and non-designers converting screenshots or ideas into wireframes fast.
review.not_for: Production UI work or pixel-level design system maintenance.
